inputs_required: fact_accuracy_metrics (MAPE, Bias, Accuracy) OR recompute from fact_forecast_values + fact_actual_values
limitations: Only 3 metric versions retained (G2); deep history needs recompute

window: Aligned forward horizon of both versions
limitations: Requires dedupe FV 2025-06-01 (G1); horizon alignment; distance metric TBD (E3)

expected_output: stability_drift_score 0-100 per Key x version (aggregated over targets)
limitations: Value freezes once target passes version (G6); dedupe (G1)
Needs >=N versions per cell; sensitive to noise; N is a config (E3)

canonical_grain: Key x Scenario x forecast_version (detected_on) x drift_type
derived_fields: weighted forecast_drift_score, severity, forecast_drift_flag, drift_type, explanation
limitations: Weights (20/40/30/10) and thresholds tunable (A5); families with no data contribute null not zero
